## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD or infrastructure
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Describe the tests performed and their results.

- [ ] Frontend build passes
- [ ] Backend checks pass
- [ ] Relevant unit or integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass when applicable
- [ ] Load tests pass when applicable

## Production impact

- [ ] No production configuration changes
- [ ] Environment variables added or changed
- [ ] Database or data migration required
- [ ] Deployment process changed
- [ ] Monitoring or alerting changed

Document any required rollout, migration, or rollback steps:

<!-- Add details here -->

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No secrets or credentials are included
- [ ] Authorization and permissions were reviewed
- [ ] User-provided data is handled safely
- [ ] Dependency changes were reviewed

## Screenshots or recordings

Add screenshots or recordings for user-facing changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and ready for review
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where needed
- [ ] Breaking changes are clearly documented
- [ ] Rollback steps are understood
